languages.text: "Возможно, надо и вправду вернуть все на круги своя. Патент — в камеру. Тебя — назад в Музеон".
"Perhaps we should indeed restore everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museion."
languages.original_text: "Возможно, надо и вправду вернуть все на круги своя. Патент — в камеру. Тебя — назад в Музеон".

traits.locale_text: "Perhaps we should indeed return everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museon."
"Perhaps we should indeed return everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museon."
"Perhaps we should indeed restore everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museion."
"Perhaps we should indeed restore everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museion."
"Perhaps we should indeed restore everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museion."

languages.text: “或许我们的确应该让一切回到原样。让贸易授状回到密室，而你回到陈列馆。”
languages.original_text: "Perhaps we should indeed restore everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museion."

traits.locale_text: “或许我们的确应该让一切回到原样。让贸易授状回到密室，而你回到陈列馆。”

languages.text: «Tal vez deberíamos devolverlo todo a su sitio. Que la Patente vuelva a estar en su cámara, y tú en tu Museion».
languages.original_text: "Perhaps we should indeed restore everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museion."

traits.locale_text: «Tal vez deberíamos devolverlo todo a su sitio. Que la Patente vuelva a estar en su cámara, y tú en tu Museion».

languages.text: « Il est vrai que nous devrions peut-être rétablir l'ordre des choses. La lettre de marque retourne à sa place, et vous, vous retournez au Muséion. »
languages.original_text: "Perhaps we should indeed restore everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museion."

traits.locale_text: « Il est vrai que nous devrions peut-être rétablir l'ordre des choses. La lettre de marque retourne à sa place, et vous, vous retournez au Muséion. »

languages.text: "Belki de gerçekten her şeyi eski hâline döndürmeliyiz. Ruhsatname odaya döner, sen de Museion'a dönersin."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps we should indeed restore everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museion."

traits.locale_text: "Belki de gerçekten her şeyi eski hâline döndürmeliyiz. Ruhsatname odaya döner, sen de Museion'a dönersin."

languages.text: "Vielleicht sollten wir tatsächlich alles wiederherstellen, wie es war. Der Handelsbrief kehrt in die Kammer zurück und Ihr in das Museion."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps we should indeed restore everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museion."

traits.locale_text: "Vielleicht sollten wir tatsächlich alles wiederherstellen, wie es war. Der Handelsbrief kehrt in die Kammer zurück und Ihr in das Museion."

languages.text: 「確かに、すべてを元に戻すべきかもしれません。証人は議場に戻り、あなたはミュゼイオンに戻ります。」
languages.original_text: "Perhaps we should indeed restore everything to how it was. The Warrant returns to the Chamber, and you return to the Museion."

traits.locale_text: 「確かに、すべてを元に戻すべきかもしれません。証人は議場に戻り、あなたはミュゼイオンに戻ります。」
